name: hb_5_11
requirements: As part of your analysis, for the source-receptor pair company 2419 -> station 98 over the period (the full day 2025-06-10), compute and store: distance_km, bearing_deg (company->station), station_mean_pm25, station_max_pm25 (float), station_exceedance_hours (PM2.5>75, int), company_total_exhaust (float).

turns.query: Analyze pollution transport from Tangshan Donghua Steel Group (company_id: 2419) to my residential area at Congtai Park station (station_id: 98) on 2025-06-10, and recommend indoor air purification strategies.
